---
title: "Compound Forms, Prefixes, Suffixes, and Naming Runes"
---

# Compound Forms, Prefixes, Suffixes, and Naming Runes

Range: `1583-1645`.

## Completion

| Status   | Count |
| -------- | ----- |
| authored | 16    |
| stub     | 47    |

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| Sigil | Term                                         | Completion | Summary                                                                                          |
| ----- | -------------------------------------------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 1583  | `STUB` [-able](#rune-1583)                   | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1584  | [-aware](#rune-1584)                         | authored   | Marks that something notices the surrounding condition it names.                                 |
| 1585  | `STUB` [-by-design](#rune-1585)              | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1586  | `STUB` [-centric](#rune-1586)                | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1587  | `STUB` [-complete](#rune-1587)               | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1588  | [-driven](#rune-1588)                        | authored   | Signals that behavior is organized around events or causes.                                      |
| 1589  | [-first](#rune-1589)                         | authored   | Declares priority or design center: security-first, API-first, offline-first.                    |
| 1590  | `STUB` [-free](#rune-1590)                   | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1591  | `STUB` [-friendly](#rune-1591)               | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1592  | `STUB` [-hard](#rune-1592)                   | stub       | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1593  | `STUB` [-less](#rune-1593)                   | stub       | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1594  | `STUB` [-local](#rune-1594)                  | stub       | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1595  | `STUB` [-native](#rune-1595)                 | stub       | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1596  | `STUB` [-of-record](#rune-1596)              | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1597  | `STUB` [-oriented](#rune-1597)               | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1598  | [-safe](#rune-1598)                          | authored   | Asserts a protected behavior such as memory-safe or thread-safe.                                 |
| 1599  | `STUB` [-sensitive](#rune-1599)              | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1600  | `STUB` [-shaped](#rune-1600)                 | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1601  | `STUB` [-soft](#rune-1601)                   | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1602  | `STUB` [-tolerant](#rune-1602)               | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1603  | `STUB` [-wide](#rune-1603)                   | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1604  | `STUB` [actor model](#rune-1604)             | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1605  | [API-first](#rune-1605)                      | authored   | Design the interface surface before the implementations behind it.                               |
| 1606  | [append-only](#rune-1606)                    | authored   | History grows by addition rather than mutation.                                                  |
| 1607  | `STUB` [best-effort](#rune-1607)             | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1608  | `STUB` [branch-free](#rune-1608)             | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1609  | `STUB` [cloud-native](#rune-1609)            | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1610  | `STUB` [command-query](#rune-1610)           | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1611  | `STUB` [control plane {Rune}](#rune-1611)    | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1612  | `STUB` [copy-on-write {Rune}](#rune-1612)    | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1613  | [crash-only](#rune-1613)                     | authored   | Only live briefly, start fast, and recover by restart rather than repair.                        |
| 1614  | `STUB` [data plane {Rune}](#rune-1614)       | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1615  | `STUB` [data-driven](#rune-1615)             | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1616  | [default-deny](#rune-1616)                   | authored   | Access is forbidden unless explicitly granted.                                                   |
| 1617  | `STUB` [edge-native](#rune-1617)             | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1618  | [event-driven](#rune-1618)                   | authored   | Action propagates from events rather than from direct polling or command loops.                  |
| 1619  | `STUB` [eventually consistent](#rune-1619)   | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1620  | [fail-fast](#rune-1620)                      | authored   | Abort early when assumptions break instead of smearing damage forward.                           |
| 1621  | `STUB` [first-class](#rune-1621)             | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1622  | `STUB` [hot path {Rune}](#rune-1622)         | stub       | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1623  | [infrastructure-as-code](#rune-1623)         | authored   | Operational change expressed as reviewable source.                                               |
| 1624  | `STUB` [least-authority](#rune-1624)         | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1625  | `STUB` [lock-free {Rune}](#rune-1625)        | stub       | A progress word; some thread always moves forward without a lock.                                |
| 1626  | [machine-readable](#rune-1626)               | authored   | Structured so software, not only humans, can read it reliably.                                   |
| 1627  | `STUB` [memory-safe {Rune}](#rune-1627)      | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1628  | `STUB` [multi-tenant](#rune-1628)            | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1629  | `STUB` [negative cache](#rune-1629)          | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1630  | `STUB` [object-capability](#rune-1630)       | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1631  | [offline-first {Rune}](#rune-1631)           | authored   | Designed to keep working with poor or absent connectivity.                                       |
| 1632  | [policy-as-code](#rune-1632)                 | authored   | Policy declared as versioned, testable code.                                                     |
| 1633  | `STUB` [queue-backed](#rune-1633)            | stub       | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1634  | `STUB` [read path](#rune-1634)               | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1635  | `STUB` [read-through cache](#rune-1635)      | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1636  | `STUB` [real-time {Rune}](#rune-1636)        | stub       | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1637  | `STUB` [rule-based](#rune-1637)              | stub       | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1638  | `STUB` [side-effect-free {Rune}](#rune-1638) | stub       | A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.                          |
| 1639  | [single source of truth](#rune-1639)         | authored   | One canonical place others are expected to mirror.                                               |
| 1640  | `STUB` [soft delete](#rune-1640)             | stub       | A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark. |
| 1641  | `STUB` [statefulset](#rune-1641)             | stub       | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1642  | `STUB` [write path](#rune-1642)              | stub       | A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.                                |
| 1643  | `STUB` [write-through cache](#rune-1643)     | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |
| 1644  | [zero-downtime](#rune-1644)                  | authored   | Change introduced without taking the service dark.                                               |
| 1645  | `STUB` [zero-knowledge](#rune-1645)          | stub       | A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.               |

## Entries

### [1583] -able {#rune-1583}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -able can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1584] -aware {#rune-1584}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Marks that something notices the surrounding condition it names.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -aware can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Marks that something notices the surrounding condition it names.

### [1585] -by-design {#rune-1585}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -by-design can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1586] -centric {#rune-1586}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -centric can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1587] -complete {#rune-1587}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -complete can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1588] -driven {#rune-1588}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Signals that behavior is organized around events or causes.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -driven can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Signals that behavior is organized around events or causes.

### [1589] -first {#rune-1589}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Declares priority or design center: security-first, API-first, offline-first.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -first can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Declares priority or design center: security-first, API-first, offline-first.

### [1590] -free {#rune-1590}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -free can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1591] -friendly {#rune-1591}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -friendly can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1592] -hard {#rune-1592}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -hard can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1593] -less {#rune-1593}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -less can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1594] -local {#rune-1594}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -local can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1595] -native {#rune-1595}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -native can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1596] -of-record {#rune-1596}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -of-record can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1597] -oriented {#rune-1597}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -oriented can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1598] -safe {#rune-1598}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Asserts a protected behavior such as memory-safe or thread-safe.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -safe can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Asserts a protected behavior such as memory-safe or thread-safe.

### [1599] -sensitive {#rune-1599}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -sensitive can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1600] -shaped {#rune-1600}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -shaped can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1601] -soft {#rune-1601}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -soft can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1602] -tolerant {#rune-1602}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -tolerant can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1603] -wide {#rune-1603}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: -wide can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1604] actor model {#rune-1604}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: actor model can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1605] API-first {#rune-1605}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Design the interface surface before the implementations behind it.

**Shadow:** Shadow: API-first can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Design the interface surface before the implementations behind it.

### [1606] append-only {#rune-1606}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** History grows by addition rather than mutation.

**Shadow:** Shadow: append-only can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** History grows by addition rather than mutation.

### [1607] best-effort {#rune-1607}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: best-effort can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1608] branch-free {#rune-1608}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: branch-free can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1609] cloud-native {#rune-1609}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: cloud-native can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1610] command-query {#rune-1610}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: command-query can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1611] control plane {Rune} {#rune-1611}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: control plane can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1612] copy-on-write {Rune} {#rune-1612}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: copy-on-write can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1613] crash-only {#rune-1613}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Only live briefly, start fast, and recover by restart rather than repair.

**Shadow:** Shadow: crash-only can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Only live briefly, start fast, and recover by restart rather than repair.

### [1614] data plane {Rune} {#rune-1614}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: data plane can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1615] data-driven {#rune-1615}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: data-driven can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1616] default-deny {#rune-1616}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Access is forbidden unless explicitly granted.

**Shadow:** Shadow: default-deny can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Access is forbidden unless explicitly granted.

### [1617] edge-native {#rune-1617}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: edge-native can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1618] event-driven {#rune-1618}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Action propagates from events rather than from direct polling or command loops.

**Shadow:** Shadow: event-driven can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Action propagates from events rather than from direct polling or command loops.

### [1619] eventually consistent {#rune-1619}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: eventually consistent can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1620] fail-fast {#rune-1620}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Abort early when assumptions break instead of smearing damage forward.

**Shadow:** Shadow: fail-fast can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Abort early when assumptions break instead of smearing damage forward.

### [1621] first-class {#rune-1621}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: first-class can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1622] hot path {Rune} {#rune-1622}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Shadow:** Shadow: hot path can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1623] infrastructure-as-code {#rune-1623}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Operational change expressed as reviewable source.

**Shadow:** Shadow: infrastructure-as-code can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Operational change expressed as reviewable source.

### [1624] least-authority {#rune-1624}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: least-authority can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1625] lock-free {Rune} {#rune-1625}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A progress word; some thread always moves forward without a lock.

**Shadow:** Shadow: lock-free can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1626] machine-readable {#rune-1626}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Structured so software, not only humans, can read it reliably.

**Shadow:** Shadow: machine-readable can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Structured so software, not only humans, can read it reliably.

### [1627] memory-safe {Rune} {#rune-1627}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: memory-safe can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1628] multi-tenant {#rune-1628}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: multi-tenant can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1629] negative cache {#rune-1629}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: negative cache can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1630] object-capability {#rune-1630}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: object-capability can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1631] offline-first {Rune} {#rune-1631}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Designed to keep working with poor or absent connectivity.

**Shadow:** Shadow: offline-first can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Designed to keep working with poor or absent connectivity.

### [1632] policy-as-code {#rune-1632}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Policy declared as versioned, testable code.

**Shadow:** Shadow: policy-as-code can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Policy declared as versioned, testable code.

### [1633] queue-backed {#rune-1633}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Shadow:** Shadow: queue-backed can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1634] read path {#rune-1634}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: read path can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1635] read-through cache {#rune-1635}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: read-through cache can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1636] real-time {Rune} {#rune-1636}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Shadow:** Shadow: real-time can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1637] rule-based {#rune-1637}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Shadow:** Shadow: rule-based can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1638] side-effect-free {Rune} {#rune-1638}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A pattern rune; its power comes from how it modifies neighboring terms.

**Shadow:** Shadow: side-effect-free can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1639] single source of truth {#rune-1639}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** One canonical place others are expected to mirror.

**Shadow:** Shadow: single source of truth can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** One canonical place others are expected to mirror.

### [1640] soft delete {#rune-1640}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A semantic affix or compound; it compresses a recurring engineering pattern into a compact mark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: soft delete can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1641] statefulset {#rune-1641}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Shadow:** Shadow: statefulset can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1642] write path {#rune-1642}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A naming rune; it changes meaning by attachment or compound form.

**Shadow:** Shadow: write path can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1643] write-through cache {#rune-1643}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: write-through cache can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

### [1644] zero-downtime {#rune-1644}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Change introduced without taking the service dark.

**Shadow:** Shadow: zero-downtime can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.

**Pocket gloss:** Change introduced without taking the service dark.

### [1645] zero-knowledge {#rune-1645}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A compositional word-form; it carries repeated design intent across many contexts.

**Shadow:** Shadow: zero-knowledge can smuggle in a guarantee the base design has not earned.
